session.user: Run `make test-erk-mcp` and report the results. Do NOT fix anything - just report.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make test-erk-mcp` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make test-erk-mcp target and report results

session.tool_result:
cd packages/erk-mcp && uv run pytest tests/ -x -q ........................... [100%] =============================== warnings summary =============================== ../../.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/config/__init__.py:1428 /home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/config/__init__.py:1428: PytestConfigWarning: Unknown config option: asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope
self._warn_or_fail_if_strict(f"Unknown config option: {key}\n")
../../.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/config/__init__.py:1428 /home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/config/__init__.py:1428: PytestConfigWarning: Unknown config option: asyncio_mode
self._warn_or_fail_if_strict(f"Unknown config option: {key}\n")
-- Docs: https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/how-to/capture-warnings.html
session.assistant:
make test-erk-mcp passed: All 27 tests passed without failures. There are 2 pytest configuration warnings about unknown options (`asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope` and `asyncio_mode`), but these are non-fatal warnings that don't affect test execution.
**Summary:** - Tests: 27 passed - Exit code: 0 (success) - Warnings: 2 non-critical configuration warnings
